source: pred.gg public profile + own aggregate baselines

archetype.label: The Wanderer
archetype.receipt: top three heroes are only 25% of 1234 games — spreading games this thin slows the climb in every queue.

entries.change: Queue carry instead of your average mix
entries.receipt: 53.8% there vs 52.9% overall, 358 games of evidence

ledger.note: wins per 100 games spent on each change; entries overlap and do not sum

leanInto.name: Kira
leanInto.engineCoachLine: Sim-optimal for sustained DPS: first spike lands around minute 12 (Sky Splitter), third item by minute 25. Take Demiurge: +24% on your headline output at minute 15.

plan: Queue carry as primary. It is your best role at 53.8% over 358 games (your overall is 52.9%). Set carry as secondary, not the other way around.
Two-hero rule for the climb: Kira. Compared with the average player on the same hero, you win about 5.5 more games per 100 on them.
Your champion pool is 23+ heroes wide and your top three are only 25% of your games. Gold-to-Platinum climbs are almost always pool-narrowing stories: aim for 70%+ of games on your top three.
The math: you are at 631 VP; Platinum III starts at 900. Your all-time peak is 922 — you have already touched Platinum-level rating once; this is a consistency problem, not a ceiling problem.
honesty: personal winrates are shrunk toward your own average (small heater samples do not count as mains)
field baselines are all-ranks aggregates from our current-patch match sample, not Gold-bracket-specific yet
winrate edges are observational; they say where you win, not why

insights.title: Recent form is below your career line
insights.finding: The last 20 games are 35% against a 53% career. Worth asking what changed before grinding more.
insights.receipt: 7/20 recent wins vs 52.9% over 1234 career games

insights.title: Deaths are creeping up
insights.finding: 5.2 deaths/game in the last 20 vs 3.8 career. Every extra death is ~25s+ of enemy free time.

insights.title: The squad sees the map through your wards
insights.finding: 8.6 wards placed+cleared per game, 1.6x the squad average. That is a real, unsung win condition.
insights.receipt: 10,120 placed + 519 cleared over 1234 games; squad average 5.3/game

insights.title: Kira is the long-term relationship
insights.finding: 155 games and you genuinely out-pilot the field on Kira — about 5.5 more wins per 100 games than the average Kira player. The hours show.

insights.title: Cuban brings out your best
insights.finding: Your record alongside Cuban Noobster is 56% over 193 ranked games — your strongest pairing in the stack. When only two of you queue, make it this one.
